nodes.label: src/index.ts, src/security.ts, src/data.ts, src/tools.ts, src/search.ts, src/embeddings.ts
package.json, package-lock.json, server.json, tsconfig.json, README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, LICENSE, .gitignore

observations: The nested repo is not registered as a submodule in Project_ARIS (.gitmodules absent, no 160000 entry).
The parent .gitignore ignores external/mcp_candidates/*/source/, keeping the snapshot out of parent tracking.
Project_ARIS references the snapshot in read-only governance and test code, not in product/runtime code.
The nested repo itself is read-only by design and exposes no write tools.
